creator: h.eichmann@gmx.de
text:
On Friday 21 March 2008, Felippe de Meirelles Motta wrote:
> Can you please test this attached patch ? I need of someone with KDE
> installed to do this test.

Hi!

- Why did you change pkg-message to pkg-message.in? There are no %% variables 
in pkg-message.in!
- INFO=	did not work because krusader installes the info files in the wrong 
directory. make install stopped with an error mesage.
- The other changes work fine. See my attached diff.


Thanks and happy easter


Heiner
